businessChallenge.zh: 健康數據平台需在長時間區間查詢時維持效能，同時面臨嚴重的資安風險需要系統性修復。
businessChallenge.en: Health data platform needed to maintain performance for long-range queries while facing serious security risks requiring systematic remediation.

technicalStrategy.zh: 設計健康數據摘要資料模型，將長時間區間查詢轉為預聚合讀取。同步主導資安修復與 Flutter App 重構，採用分層架構隔離資料存取邏輯。
technicalStrategy.en: Designed health data summary model converting long-range queries to pre-aggregated reads. Led security remediation and Flutter app refactoring with layered architecture isolating data access logic.

text.zh: 健康數據摘要模型，解決長時間區間讀取效能瓶頸
text.en: Health data summary model resolving long-range query performance bottlenecks

text.zh: 中／高風險資安項目由 168 項降至 12 項（縮減逾 90%）
text.en: Reduced medium/high security risks from 168 to 12 (>90%)

text.zh: 改善系統可維護性，為後續功能擴展奠定基礎
text.en: Improved maintainability, enabling future feature expansion

lessonsLearned.zh: 效能與資安問題往往源於早期的資料模型設計。在功能快速迭代時，仍需保留架構審查的節奏。
lessonsLearned.en: Performance and security issues often stem from early data model design. Even during rapid feature iteration, architecture review cadence must be preserved.

problem.zh: 健康數據平台需在長時間區間查詢時維持效能，並處理資安風險。
problem.en: Health data platform needed performant long-range queries and security remediation.

solution.zh: 設計健康數據摘要資料模型，協助重構並改善資安；Flutter App 開發維護。
solution.en: Designed health data summary model, led refactoring and security fixes; Flutter app delivery.

text.zh: 中／高風險資安項目由 168 項降至 12 項（縮減逾 90%）
text.en: Reduced medium/high security risks from 168 to 12 (>90%)
